metadata.name: Experiment 04 - VLM-direct (gpt-5.4)
metadata.description: E04 single-pass VLM-direct extraction. Sends the document image plus a strict-mode JSON Schema response_format to Azure OpenAI's chat-completions endpoint (gpt-5.4 by default). The model emits { fields, source_quotes } in one call — no separate OCR pre-pass. Each field carries a verbatim source_quote as a hallucination guard; the mapper synthesises per-field confidence from quote presence (with-evidence → 0.95, without → 0.50). Sync-shape chain: prepareFileData → vlmDirect.extract → ocr.cleanup → ocr.checkConfidence → reviewSwitch → humanReview/storeResults. Image inputs only; PDF rendering is deferred to a follow-up experiment (the canonical 40-sample dataset is 100% JPEG).

modelId.description: Engine identifier surfaced in OCRResult.modelId. The VLM activity overrides it with the deployed Azure OpenAI deployment name when set via params.azureOpenAiDeployment.

templateModelId.description: Labeling TemplateModel id. The VLM-direct activity loads this template's field_schema and builds the strict-mode JSON Schema sent to the chat-completions endpoint.

azureOpenAiDeployment.description: Azure OpenAI deployment name (vision-capable). Defaults to gpt-5.4. Override per-run to compare deployments without re-seeding.

confidenceThreshold.description: OCR confidence threshold for human review. The VLM mapper synthesises per-field confidence from source_quote presence; with the 0.95 default, fields with no source_quote (synthesised at 0.50) drag the page-level mean below the gate, surfacing them for HITL review.

ocrResponse.description: Raw VLM chat-completions response (with parsed { fields, source_quotes }), emitted alongside ocrResult so the benchmark sample workflow's persistOcrCache step writes it to benchmark_ocr_cache.

parameters.documentAnnotationPrompt:
Extract structured field values from this BC SDPR Monthly Report form.

Conventions:
- The form has two parallel income columns: **Applicant** (left) and **Spouse** (right). Each `applicant_*` field reads the LEFT column; each `spouse_*` field reads the RIGHT column. Never mix columns.
- **Numeric income fields:** Look at the cell carefully and distinguish two cases:
  - If the cell is **completely blank** (no number written, no "0", no "$0", no dash), return **null**.
  - If the cell explicitly shows `0`, `$0`, `$ 0`, `0.00`, or any literal zero, return the number `0`.
  - Otherwise, return the dollar amount as a plain number with no `$`, no commas, no spaces (e.g., `1234.56`).
  - This distinction matters: do NOT default empty cells to 0 — that loses information.
- **Comma is a thousands separator, not a decimal.** When you see `$8,641` or `$ 8,641`, the value is `8641` (eight thousand six hundred forty-one), NOT `8.641`. The decimal separator on this form is the period (`.`); commas only group thousands. So `$1,234.56` → `1234.56` and `$ 8,641` → `8641`.
- Checkbox fields ending in `_yes` or `_no`: return `selected` if the box is filled/checked, `unselected` otherwise. The form gives a Yes/No pair for every question — for any answered question exactly one of the pair is `selected` and the other is `unselected`. Some questions have separate Applicant and Spouse Yes/No pairs (suffix `_spouse_yes` / `_spouse_no`); read those from the spouse-specific row.
- Text fields (`signature`, `name`, `phone`, `sin`, and their `spouse_*` counterparts): extract the visible text exactly as written, preserving punctuation, hyphens, parentheses, dots, and spacing as they appear on the form. For phone numbers, do NOT normalize the format — if the form shows `(227) 837-843`, return `(227) 837-843`, not `227 837 843`. Use empty string `""` if blank.
- `signature` is the cursive/initial mark in the signature box. `name` is the printed full name. They are separate fields and must not be swapped.
- Date fields (`date`, `spouse_date`): extract in `YYYY-MM-DD` format. The form prints date headers like `(yyyy-mmm-dd)` — interpret the value accordingly (`mmm` is a 3-letter month abbreviation, e.g. `MAR` → `03`, `SEP` → `09`).
- `explain_changes`: free-text field. Capture the entire paragraph if present, otherwise empty string.
- Officer-only / case-management fields (NEXT CHEQUE ISSUE, CASE ID, CASELOAD, etc.) are NOT in the schema — ignore them.

Be conservative: if a number is illegible, return null (treat as blank). Do NOT guess values that aren't visibly written on the form.

fieldDescriptions.checkbox_need_assistance_yes: Section 1, Question 1: 'Are you still in need of assistance?' — return 'selected' if the YES box is checked.
fieldDescriptions.checkbox_need_assistance_no: Section 1, Question 1: 'Are you still in need of assistance?' — return 'selected' if the NO box is checked.
fieldDescriptions.checkbox_family_assets_yes: Section 1, Question 2: 'Has your family unit received or disposed of any assets?' — return 'selected' if the YES box is checked.
fieldDescriptions.checkbox_family_assets_no: Section 1, Question 2: 'Has your family unit received or disposed of any assets?' — return 'selected' if the NO box is checked.
fieldDescriptions.checkbox_shelter_yes: Section 1, Question 3: 'Any changes to your shelter costs?' — return 'selected' if YES is checked.
fieldDescriptions.checkbox_shelter_no: Section 1, Question 3: 'Any changes to your shelter costs?' — return 'selected' if NO is checked.
fieldDescriptions.checkbox_dependants_yes: Section 1, Question 4: 'Any changes in Dependants or Persons living in the home?' — return 'selected' if YES is checked.
fieldDescriptions.checkbox_dependants_no: Section 1, Question 4: 'Any changes in Dependants or Persons living in the home?' — return 'selected' if NO is checked.
fieldDescriptions.checkbox_employment_changes_yes: Section 1, Question 5 (APPLICANT column, left): 'Any employment changes?' — return 'selected' if Applicant's YES is checked.
fieldDescriptions.checkbox_employment_changes_no: Section 1, Question 5 (APPLICANT column, left): 'Any employment changes?' — return 'selected' if Applicant's NO is checked.
fieldDescriptions.checkbox_employment_changes_spouse_yes: Section 1, Question 5 (SPOUSE column, right): 'Any employment changes?' — return 'selected' if Spouse's YES is checked.
fieldDescriptions.checkbox_employment_changes_spouse_no: Section 1, Question 5 (SPOUSE column, right): 'Any employment changes?' — return 'selected' if Spouse's NO is checked.
fieldDescriptions.checkbox_school_yes: Section 1, Question 6 (APPLICANT column): 'Are you attending / enrolled in school or training?' — return 'selected' if Applicant's YES is checked.
fieldDescriptions.checkbox_school_no: Section 1, Question 6 (APPLICANT column): same question — return 'selected' if Applicant's NO is checked.
fieldDescriptions.checkbox_school_spouse_yes: Section 1, Question 6 (SPOUSE column): same question — return 'selected' if Spouse's YES is checked.
fieldDescriptions.checkbox_school_spouse_no: Section 1, Question 6 (SPOUSE column): same question — return 'selected' if Spouse's NO is checked.
fieldDescriptions.checkbox_work_yes: Section 1, Question 7 (APPLICANT column): 'Are you looking for work?' — return 'selected' if Applicant's YES is checked.
fieldDescriptions.checkbox_work_no: Section 1, Question 7 (APPLICANT column): same question — return 'selected' if Applicant's NO is checked.
fieldDescriptions.checkbox_work_spouse_yes: Section 1, Question 7 (SPOUSE column): same question — return 'selected' if Spouse's YES is checked.
fieldDescriptions.checkbox_work_spouse_no: Section 1, Question 7 (SPOUSE column): same question — return 'selected' if Spouse's NO is checked.
fieldDescriptions.checkbox_moved_yes: Section 1, Question 8 (APPLICANT column): 'Have you moved or entered a facility?' — return 'selected' if Applicant's YES is checked.
fieldDescriptions.checkbox_moved_no: Section 1, Question 8 (APPLICANT column): same question — return 'selected' if Applicant's NO is checked.
fieldDescriptions.checkbox_moved_spouse_yes: Section 1, Question 8 (SPOUSE column): same question — return 'selected' if Spouse's YES is checked.
fieldDescriptions.checkbox_moved_spouse_no: Section 1, Question 8 (SPOUSE column): same question — return 'selected' if Spouse's NO is checked.
fieldDescriptions.checkbox_warrant_yes: Section 1, Question 9 (APPLICANT column): 'Any outstanding warrants for your arrest?' — return 'selected' if Applicant's YES is checked.
fieldDescriptions.checkbox_warrant_no: Section 1, Question 9 (APPLICANT column): same question — return 'selected' if Applicant's NO is checked.
fieldDescriptions.checkbox_warrant_spouse_yes: Section 1, Question 9 (SPOUSE column): same question — return 'selected' if Spouse's YES is checked.
fieldDescriptions.checkbox_warrant_spouse_no: Section 1, Question 9 (SPOUSE column): same question — return 'selected' if Spouse's NO is checked.
fieldDescriptions.explain_changes: Free-text paragraph immediately below 'Please explain all changes including income and submit proof:'. Capture the entire handwritten/typed paragraph verbatim. Empty string if blank.
fieldDescriptions.signature: APPLICANT's signature (cursive mark or initials) in the 'Applicant Signature' box at the bottom of the form. Distinct from the printed name. Empty string if blank.
fieldDescriptions.spouse_signature: SPOUSE's signature (cursive mark or initials) in the 'Spouse Signature' box at the bottom of the form. Empty string if blank.
fieldDescriptions.date: APPLICANT's signature date in the box labeled 'Date (yyyy-mmm-dd)' next to the Applicant Signature. Return as YYYY-MM-DD.
fieldDescriptions.spouse_date: SPOUSE's signature date in the box labeled 'Date (yyyy-mmm-dd)' next to the Spouse Signature. Return as YYYY-MM-DD.
fieldDescriptions.name: APPLICANT's printed full name in the 'Applicant Print Name' box at the bottom of the form. Empty string if blank.
fieldDescriptions.spouse_name: SPOUSE's printed full name in the 'Spouse Print Name' box at the bottom of the form. Empty string if blank.
fieldDescriptions.phone: APPLICANT's telephone number in the 'Applicant Telephone' box. Preserve formatting (parens, hyphens) as written. Empty string if blank.
fieldDescriptions.spouse_phone: SPOUSE's telephone number in the 'Spouse Telephone' box. Preserve formatting. Empty string if blank.
fieldDescriptions.sin: APPLICANT's Social Insurance Number, 9 digits. Strip any spaces or hyphens. Empty string if blank.
fieldDescriptions.spouse_sin: SPOUSE's Social Insurance Number, 9 digits. Strip any spaces or hyphens. Empty string if blank.
fieldDescriptions.applicant_net_employment_income: Section 2 income table, row 'Net Employment Income', APPLICANT column (left). Numeric; return null if the cell is blank, the number 0 only if the cell explicitly shows 0 or $0, otherwise the dollar amount as a number.
fieldDescriptions.applicant_employment_insurance: Section 2 income table, row 'Employment Insurance', APPLICANT column. Numeric; return null if the cell is blank, the number 0 only if the cell explicitly shows 0 or $0, otherwise the dollar amount as a number.
fieldDescriptions.applicant_spousal_support_alimony: Section 2 income table, row 'Spousal Support / Alimony', APPLICANT column. Numeric; return null if the cell is blank, the number 0 only if the cell explicitly shows 0 or $0, otherwise the dollar amount as a number.
fieldDescriptions.applicant_child_support: Section 2 income table, row 'Child Support', APPLICANT column. Numeric; return null if the cell is blank, the number 0 only if the cell explicitly shows 0 or $0, otherwise the dollar amount as a number.
fieldDescriptions.applicant_workbc_financial_support: Section 2 income table, row 'WorkBC Financial Support', APPLICANT column. Numeric; return null if the cell is blank, the number 0 only if the cell explicitly shows 0 or $0, otherwise the dollar amount as a number.
fieldDescriptions.applicant_student_funding_loans_bursarie: Section 2, row 'Student Funding (eg: Loans, Bursaries)', APPLICANT column. Numeric; return null if the cell is blank, the number 0 only if the cell explicitly shows 0 or $0, otherwise the dollar amount as a number.

ocr-extraction.label: VLM-direct Extraction (gpt-5.4)
ocr-extraction.description: Single-pass VLM extraction. Sends the document image plus a strict JSON Schema response_format to Azure OpenAI's chat-completions endpoint. The model emits { fields, source_quotes } in one round-trip; no separate OCR pre-pass.

quality-gate.label: Quality Gate
quality-gate.description: Check OCR confidence and decide if human review is needed

human-review.label: Human Review
human-review.description: Wait for human approval when confidence is low
